Home / Service Areas / Chula Vista

Solar in Chula Vista, CA

Trusted local professionals serving Chula Vista and surrounding communities

Serving Chula Vista, CA

Onyx Solar proudly serves Chula Vista, a vibrant suburban community with thousands of 1970s-80s era homes that are perfect for solar panel installations. With its mild year-round climate, Chula Vista residents enjoy abundant sunshine, making solar energy a smart investment for reducing electricity bills. Our customized solar solutions help homeowners take advantage of the city's solar-friendly policies and incentives while preserving the character of their neighborhoods.

Chula Vista's suburban homes from the 1970s-80s often have spacious rooftops ideal for solar arrays.

Solar Roof Replacement

Seamless roof and solar upgrades for aging San Diego homes.
